title.ko: 사진을 촬영하기 위하여 또는 사진을 투영하여 직시하기 위한 장치 또는 배치; 광파 이외의 파를 사용하는 유사기술을 사용하는 장치 또는 배치; 그것을 위한 부속물(그런 장치의 광학적 부분 G02B; 광사진용 광감지 재료 또는 과정 G03C; 광사진 물질을 노출하기 위한 과정을 위한 장치 G03D)

definition.ko: 세부 카메라, 투영기와 인화기 중 적어도 2개에 공통된 것 G03B1/00 ～ 5/00 카메라에만 공통된 것 노출, 그것의 제어 G03B7/00, G03B9/00 뷰파인더, 초점 조절 보조부재 G03B13/00 필터; 세부구조, 부속품 G03B11/00; 17/00 사진촬영을 하는 특수방법 G03B15/00 투영기에만 공통된 것 G03B21/00, G03B23/00 인화기에만 공통된 것 G03B27/00 장치 카메라 G03B19/00 투영기, 뷰어(VIEWER); 화면을 전환하기 위한 장치 G03B21/00, G03B25/00, G03B23/00 인화장치 G03B27/00 다른 장치와 조합된 것 G03B29/00 특수장치 음향장치와 조합된 작동 G03B31/00 칼라사진; 입체사진; 파노라마사진; 고속 사진 G03B33/00; 35/00; 37/00; 39/00 다른 기법 G03B41/00 광파 이외의 파를 사용하는 것, 시각화 G03B42/00 시험 G03B43/00

by a follow-up movement of an associated reference mark to the pointer

in the camera

a hand-actuated member moved from one position to another providing the energy to move the setting member, e.g. depression of shutter release button causes a stepped feeler to co-operate with the pointer of the light-sensitive device to set the diaphragm and thereafter release the shutter
setting of both shutter and diaphragm aperture being effected so as to give the optimum compromise between depth of field and shortness of exposure

in accordance with both the intensity of the flash source and the distance of the flash source from the object, e.g. in accordance with the "guide number" of the flash bulb and the focusing of the camera

in accordance with change of lens

title.ko: 카메라, 영사기 또는 비사진적 비광학적 장치를 가진 사진인화장치, 예. 시계, 또는 무기; 다른 물체 모양의 카메라 (섬광장치와의 조합 15/03
title.en: Combinations of cameras, projectors or photographic printing apparatus with non-photographic non-optical apparatus, e.g. clocks or weapons; Cameras having the shape of other objects (combinations with flash apparatus G03B0015030000)
Camera modules comprising integrated lens units and imaging units, specially adapted for being embedded in other devices, e.g. mobile phones or vehicles
Special techniques
Associated working of cameras or projectors with sound-recording or sound-reproducing means
in which sound track is on a moving-picture film
in which sound track is not on, but is synchronised with, a moving-picture film
in which sound track is associated with successively-shown still pictures
with fade-in and fade-out effects

title.ko: 칼라사진, 칼라필름을 단순히 노출 또는 영사하는 이외의 것(인화장치 27/00; 입체 칼라사진 35/00)
title.en: Colour photography, other than mere exposure or projection of a colour film (printing apparatus G03B0027000000;stereoscopic colour photography G03B0035000000)
by two-colour separation records, e.g. red-aspect and white complete records; using Land effect
by four or more separation records
by additive-colour projection apparatus
Sequential recording or projection (G03B0033020000, G03B0033040000, G03B0033060000 take precedence)
Simultaneous recording or projection (G03B0033020000, G03B0033040000, G03B0033060000 take precedence)
using beam-splitting or beam-combining systems, e.g. dichroic mirrors

title.ko: 렌티클러 스크린(lenticular screen)을 사용하는 것(필름과 일체의 것 G03C)

title.ko: 색무늬 스크린을 사용하는 것(필름과 일체의 것 G03C)
title.en: using colour-pattern screens (integral with film G03C)

title.ko: 입체사진
title.en: Stereoscopic photography
by sequential recording
with movement of beam-selecting members in a system defining two or more viewpoints
with axial movement of lens or gate between exposures
by simultaneous recording
having single camera with stereoscopic-base-defining system
involving recording of different viewpoint images in different colours on a colour film

title.ko: 다른 형식의 기록간의 변환을 하기 위해 특히 적합한 인화장치(42/08이 우선)

by sequential viewing
by simultaneous viewing
using two or more projectors
using single projector with stereoscopic-base-defining system
using apertured or refractive resolving means on screen or between screen and eye
using polarised or coloured light for separating different viewpoint images

title.ko: 파노라마 또는 와이드 스크린사진; 광범위면 촬영, 예. 측량용; 내부표면촬영, 예. 관내
title.en: Panoramic or wide-screen photography; Photographing extended surfaces, e.g. for surveying; Photographing internal surfaces, e.g. of pipe
with scanning movement of lens or camera
with cameras or projectors providing touching or overlapping fields of view

title.ko: 상에 비뚤어짐을 주는 것(37/02, 34/04가 우선)
title.en: involving anamorphosis (G03B0037020000, G03B0037040000 take precedence)

title.ko: 고속도 사진
title.en: High-speed photography

title.ko: 정지한 감광판 또는 필름을 사용하는 것(39/06이 우선)
title.en: using stationary plate or film (G03B0039060000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 움직이는 감광판 또는 필름을 사용하는 것(39/06이 우선)
title.en: using moving plate or film (G03B0039060000 takes precedence)
using light-guides for transferring image frame or elements thereof into different array, e.g. into a line

with optical compensator
with rotating reflecting member
with rotating transmitting member
with oscillating reflecting member
with oscillating transmitting member
Overcoming image movement by brief flashes of light
Obtaining records using waves other than optical waves; Visualisation of such records by using optical means
using X-rays
Holders for X-ray films
using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves
Visualisation of records by optical means
